creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
From: <hetzels@westbend.net>
> >Fix:
>
> NOTE FOR COMMITER
> After applying the attached diff, remove patch-ad and patch-ae.
>
Since the ports Makefile defines USE_AUTOCONF, which will rebuild the ports
configure script with autoconf, patch-aa is no-longer required.

Scot
